name: Dark Mode Pro
description: Deep greens and vibrant emerald highlights for high contrast.

preview.sampleText: Terminal aesthetics meet high-end editorial design.

classes.th: border border-gray-700 p-2 bg-gray-800 font-semibold text-emerald-400
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-emerald-500 pl-4 italic my-4 text-gray-400 bg-gray-800 py-2 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-gray-800 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-emerald-400
classes.pre: bg-gray-900 p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto border border-gray-700
